name: @aristotle/sigstore-rekor-verify
description: SET signature + inclusion-proof validation companion to @aristotle/sigstore-rekor. Verifies a Rekor TimestampAnchor's signedEntryTimestamp against a caller-supplied Rekor public key + checks the inclusion proof against the published log root. Closes the verification loop the Rekor client deliberately deferred. Parallel to @aristotle/gel-timestamp-rfc3161-verify.
